title: External AI applications
subtitle: Use compatible work from other AI applications without copying it into BitFun.

unavailable.title: Sources unavailable
unavailable.desktopOnly: External sources are available in the desktop app.
unavailable.remoteWorkspace: Remote workspace sources are not supported yet. No local configuration was loaded in their place.

errors.nonBlocking: Some external sources could not be refreshed. Existing valid commands remain available. {{error}}

diagnostics.summary: {{count}} source entries need attention. Existing valid commands remain available.

sources.title: Detected sources
sources.description: Sources remain in their original locations. Changes are picked up automatically while this page is open.
sources.globalOnly: Showing user-global sources. Open a workspace to include its project sources.
sources.empty: No compatible external sources were detected.

conflicts.title: Needs your choice
conflicts.description: Same-name extensions are not activated silently. Your choice is remembered until a participant changes version.
conflicts.pending: Choose one available source to make this command available.
